title: Bring Her Again, O Western Wind
content:
Bring her again, O western wind,
    Over the western sea:
    Gentle and good and fair and kind,
    Bring her again to me!

    Not that her fancy holds me dear,
    Not that a hope may be:
    Only that I may know her near,
    Wind of the western sea.

    1875
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, William Ernest Henley delivers a powerful performance in "Bring Her Again, O Western Wind"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
